# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default server for all pods in namespace"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authz-policy
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default authorization policy for namespace"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mesh-tls-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authn
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Mesh TLS authentication for service mesh"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*"
  identityRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: ServiceAccount
      name: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-server-authz
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default authorization for all services"
spec:
  server:
    name: default-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: all-authenticated
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Server for authenticated traffic"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-authenticated
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allow authenticated mesh traffic"
spec:
  server:
    name: all-authenticated
  client:
    meshTLS:
      unauthenticated: false
      identities:
        - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cluster-wide-server
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Server for cluster-wide communication"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 8080-8090
  proxyProtocol: Unknown
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cluster-wide-authz
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Cluster-wide authorization policy"
spec:
  server:
    name: cluster-wide-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - namespace: default
          name: "*"
        - namespace: kube-system
          name: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: network-authn
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Network-based authentication"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: network-authz-policy
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Authorization for network-based traffic"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: cluster-wide-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      name: network-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-route
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default HTTP route for services"
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: "/"
      backendRefs:
        - name: default
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: deny-all-server
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Server with explicit deny-all policy"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      policy: strict
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: deny-all
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Explicit deny-all authorization"
spec:
  server:
    name: deny-all-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts: []
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-server
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Server for administrative endpoints"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      role: admin
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-only
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Authorization for admin service accounts only"
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-sa
          namespace: default
